Field.Label: Dashboards reads INDIGO_URL / INDIGO_API_KEY / DAHUA_USER / DAHUA_PASS from IndigoSecrets.py. The fields below are optional PluginConfig fallbacks for users who don't use IndigoSecrets.py and for the dashboard-specific options (legacy Sigen URL, cameras list, swap-out host).

Optional. URL of a legacy Sigenergy mini-dashboard (e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8179/). Used only by the "Open Legacy Sigen Dashboard" menu item; leave blank to disable the item. Read from IndigoSecrets.SIGEN_DASHBOARD_URL first; this field is a fallback.

Optional JSON list of camera objects. Each object needs host, name, vendor ("dahua" or "hikvision"). Read from IndigoSecrets.DASHBOARDS_CAMERAS first; this field is a fallback. Example: [{"host":"192.168.1.50","name":"Front Door","vendor":"dahua"},{"host":"192.168.1.51","name":"Drive","vendor":"hikvision"}]. Leave blank to disable the cameras grid + MJPEG proxy + go2rtc. All cams share DAHUA_USER / DAHUA_PASS from IndigoSecrets (despite the name, those creds also work for Hikvision).

Optional. Host of the camera that gets bumped from live MJPEG to a still snapshot when the user peeks at a tail-of-list camera. Defaults to the LAST entry in the Cameras list. Override only if a different cam is the better drop candidate.
